mapper.sql:
INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN term_products tp ON oi.product_id = tp.id LEFT JOIN user_addresses ua ON o.address_id = ua.id LEFT JOIN mall_user u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE tp.merchant_id = #{shopId}
AND o.status = ( CASE #{status} WHEN 'pending' THEN 1 WHEN 'paid' THEN 2 WHEN 'shipped' THEN 3 WHEN 'completed' THEN 4 WHEN 'cancelled' THEN 0 ELSE -1 END )
AND ( o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.name, ''), NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), u.username, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.phone, ''), NULLIF(u.phone, ''), '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND o.created_at >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND o.created_at <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
mapper.select:
SELECT t.orderNo, t.createTime, t.customerName, t.customerPhone, t.totalAmount, t.dbStatus, t.productInfo FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT o.id, o.order_no AS orderNo, DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime, COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.name, ''), NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), u.username, '') AS customerName, COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.phone, ''), NULLIF(u.phone, ''), '') AS customerPhone, IFNULL(o.total_amount, 0) AS totalAmount, o.status AS dbStatus, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT(oi2.product_name, ' x', oi2.quantity) ORDER BY oi2.id SEPARATOR ', ' ) FROM order_items oi2 WHERE oi2.order_id = o.id) AS productInfo FROM orders o
) t ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) FROM orders o

SELECT o.order_no AS orderNo, DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime, COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.name, ''), NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), u.username, '') AS customerName, COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.phone, ''), NULLIF(u.phone, ''), '') AS customerPhone, CONCAT( IFNULL(ua.province, ''), IFNULL(ua.city, ''), IFNULL(ua.district, ''), IFNULL(ua.detail, '') ) AS address, IFNULL(o.total_amount, 0) AS totalAmount, o.status AS dbStatus, IFNULL(o.ship_company, '') AS shipCompany, IFNULL(o.ship_no, '') AS trackingNo, IFNULL(o.ship_remark, '') AS shipRemark FROM orders o LEFT JOIN user_addresses ua ON o.address_id = ua.id LEFT JOIN mall_user u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT oi.product_name AS name, oi.sku_attributes AS spec, IFNULL(oi.price, 0) AS price, oi.quantity AS quantity, IFNULL(oi.price * oi.quantity, 0) AS subtotal FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN term_products tp ON oi.product_id = tp.id WHERE oi.order_id = (SELECT id FROM orders WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1)
AND tp.merchant_id = #{shopId}
SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.status, o.merchant_id, o.user_id, o.pay_time FROM orders o WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, ship_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 3 THEN NOW() ELSE ship_time END, receive_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 4 THEN NOW() ELSE receive_time END, cancel_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 0 THEN NOW() ELSE cancel_time END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
UPDATE orders SET ship_company = #{express}, ship_no = #{trackingNo}, ship_remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
